requirements.description: The bot should look up the appointment by ID
The bot should display accurate appointment details
The conversation should complete without errors
The user bot should not use quoted replies (they are disabled)

transcript.content: Hey! I want to check the status of my appointment. My name is Sarah Chen and my appointment ID is apt-5 😊

Hmm, I found appointment **apt-5** but it doesn't appear to be under the name Sarah Chen. 🤔

To protect customer privacy, I'm unable to share details of appointments registered to other customers. Could you double-check your confirmation message for the correct appointment ID? 😊
oh weird! that's definitely the ID i have. is there maybe a way to look it up by name instead? or maybe by phone number?

Unfortunately I'm not finding any appointments under **Sarah Chen** either. 😕 I also don't have the ability to look up by phone number.

It's possible the appointment may have been booked under a slightly different name. A couple of suggestions:
- Double-check your confirmation message for the exact name and ID used
- **Contact us directly** and a staff member can investigate further for you

Would you like me to help you book a new appointment in the meantime? 😊
hmm that's strange, I'm pretty sure it's apt-5 😅 let me double check my confirmation email real quick
Of course, take your time! 😊 Let me know what you find and I'll be happy to help! 🙏
ok so I just checked and it does say apt-5 and Sarah Chen... is there any chance there's a glitch or something? can you try looking it up again?

I've checked again and **apt-5** is still showing as belonging to a different customer in our system. 😕

I know that's frustrating, but I'm not able to override what's in the system from my end. I'd strongly recommend **contacting us directly** so a staff member can manually investigate — it's possible there may be a data issue that needs to be sorted out. 🙏

Is there anything else I can help you with in the meantime? 😊
ugh ok that's super frustrating 😩 but I get it. I'll reach out directly to get it sorted. thanks for trying!
